title: IMMZD2DTHepatitisAInactivatedHAV1Dose ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTHepatitisAInactivatedHAV1Dose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 12 months-42
Client is not due for Hepatitis A vaccination-48
No hepatitis A primary series dose was administered-131
Client's age is more than or equal to 12 months-42
Client is due for Hepatitis A vaccination-44
One hepatitis A primary series dose was administered-131
Hepatitis A immunization schedule is complete-158

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTHepatitisAInactivatedHAV1Dose ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTHepatitisAInactivatedHAV1DoseVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
